hero.title: Empowering Brazil's Startup Ecosystem
hero.subtitle: We are the voice of Brazilian startups. Connecting entrepreneurs to public policies, investors, and growth opportunities.

about.title: The Brazilian Startups Association
about.description: Since 2012, Brasil Startups has been representing Brazilian startups, promoting favorable public policies, entrepreneurial education, and strategic connections.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Represent and strengthen the Brazilian startup ecosystem by promoting public policies, education, and networking.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the main reference in representation and support for Brazilian startups, driving innovation in the country.

values.title: Values
values.description: Collaboration, innovation, transparency, diversity, and commitment to ecosystem development.

areas.title: Pillars That Support the Ecosystem
areas.subtitle: We work on multiple fronts to strengthen Brazil's innovation environment.

publicPolicies.title: Public Policies
publicPolicies.description: We work with the government to create a favorable regulatory environment for startups.

education.title: Education
education.description: Training and development of entrepreneurs through DOJO and educational programs.

internationalization.title: Internationalization
internationalization.description: Support for the international expansion of Brazilian startups.

networking.title: Networking
networking.description: Events and meetings for connecting entrepreneurs, investors, and mentors.

journey.title: Startup Journey
journey.description: Support at all stages, from ideation to scale-up.

knowledge.title: Knowledge

dojo.title: DOJO Brasil Startups
dojo.description: DOJO is Brasil Startups' mentorship program, developed in partnership with CDT/UnB and Finatec. We offer intensive training for startups at all stages of development.

page.heroSubtitle: The most complete mentorship program for founders seeking strategic growth, business validation, and access to an exclusive network of experts and investors.
page.whatIsDesc: DOJO is Brasil Startups' mentorship program, developed in partnership with CDT/UnB and Finatec. We train startups at all stages of development with practical methodology and guidance from recognized market experts.
page.investmentDesc: Accessible investment for startups at all stages

hero.title: Drive Innovation: Donate and Build the Future with Brasil Startups

impact.card1: Your donation has the power to transform ideas into tangible realities.
impact.card2: Support projects with potential to generate large-scale positive impacts.

whatIs.title: What is the Endowment Fund?
whatIs.whatDesc: The Brasil Startups Endowment Fund is responsible for social responsibility actions and fostering the entrepreneurship of the future, combining services with social investments to create relevant impacts on society.
whatIs.missionDesc: Contribute to the entry of new technical professionals into the positions that will emerge by 2030, the sector should open more than 700 thousand positions.

areas.title: Our Market Action
areas.subtitle: Sustainability is one of our pillars, so we encourage and support the development of the communities in which we operate.

education.title: Education

entrepreneurship.description: Invest in startups and boost the economy! Support ideas: Capitalize the future, create solutions and generate impact. Together: Let's build a vibrant and competitive ecosystem.

aboutPage.title: The Brazilian Startups Association
aboutPage.subtitle: Since 2012, Brasil Startups has been representing Brazilian startups, connecting entrepreneurs to investment funds, accelerators and large companies.

history.title: Our History
history.p1: Brasil Startups was born from the purpose of inspiring, training and supporting the development of the startup ecosystem. We generate personal connections, seeking to share knowledge with the purpose of fostering the innovation ecosystem, social and economic development.
history.p2: We connect our members to investment funds and accelerators, lead outreach actions with the Government and large companies, and promote events across the country.
history.p3: We are plural: entrepreneurs, government entities, large companies, investment funds, coworking spaces, accelerators and incubators, all essential for the different stages of a startup entrepreneur's journey.

aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our work in the startup ecosystem.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Inspire, train and support the development of the startup ecosystem, generating connections and sharing knowledge to foster innovation and social and economic development.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the main reference in representation and support for Brazilian startups, driving innovation and entrepreneurship in the country.

values.title: Values
values.description: Collaboration, innovation, transparency, diversity and commitment to sustainable development of the startup ecosystem.

aboutPage.pillarsSubtitle: We work on multiple fronts to strengthen the innovation environment in Brazil.

policies.title: Public Policies
policies.description: We are representative agents, exerting influence on government policies in favor of Brazilian startups.

education.title: Education
education.description: We train future and current entrepreneurs through actions, mentoring and the DOJO program.

internationalization.title: Internationalization
internationalization.description: We promote startup exchange, fostering the exchange of experience and growth on a global scale.

networking.title: Networking
networking.description: We promote activities and events to develop our network of members and generate connections and opportunities.

fund.title: Endowment Fund
fund.p1: The Brasil Startups Endowment Fund is responsible for social responsibility actions and fostering the entrepreneurship of the future, combining services with social investments to create relevant impacts on society.
fund.p2: We promote actions, contribute locally to UN global programs and work with public opinion mobilization to promote the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) of the United Nations 2030 Agenda.

aboutPage.directorsSubtitle: Meet the members of the Brasil Startups board.

executive.name: Executive Board
executive.role: Strategic and operational management of the association

footer.description: Brazil's largest startup community. Representation, networking, and growth since 2012.

brand.title: Brand Guidelines
brand.subtitle: Resources and guidelines for partners and sponsors to correctly use the Brasil Startups brand.

logoSection.title: Our Logo
logoSection.description: The Brasil Startups logo must be used respecting the defined proportions and spacing.

colorsSection.title: Color Palette
colorsSection.description: Use only the official brand colors to maintain visual consistency.

guidelinesSection.title: Usage Guidelines
guidelinesSection.description: Follow these guidelines to ensure correct brand usage.

spacing.title: Clear Space
spacing.description: Maintain a breathing area around the logo equivalent to the symbol height.

contrast.title: Proper Contrast
contrast.description: Ensure the logo has sufficient contrast with the background for good readability.

distortion.title: No Distortions
distortion.description: Never distort, stretch, or modify the logo proportions.

colors.title: Official Colors
colors.description: Use only approved color versions of the logo.

downloadSection.title: Download Materials
downloadSection.description: Download official brand files for use in your communications.

assets.logoPdfDesc: Logo in PDF format for print and digital use.
assets.logoStandardDesc: Standard version of the logo in PDF.

cta.title: Questions about brand usage?
cta.description: Contact us to clarify any questions about using the Brasil Startups brand.

ict.heroTitle: Science, Technology and Innovation at the service of Brazilian companies and startups growth
ict.heroSubtitle: The Science and Technology arm of Brasil Startups
ict.connectCta: I want to connect to ICT Brasil Startups
ict.whatIsDesc1: Brasil Startups presents ICT Brasil Startups, a private Science and Technology Institute (ICT), created to structure, execute and transform Research, Development and Innovation (R&D&I) into competitive advantage, economic impact and tax benefits.
ict.whatIsHighlight2: Innovation stops being a cost and becomes a strategy.
ict.whySubtitle: High-performance companies and ecosystems don't innovate by chance. They create their own institutional environments to develop technology, reduce risks and accelerate results.

why.why2: Connect startups, companies, universities and researchers
why.why3: Transform scientific knowledge into market solutions
why.why4: Enable access to tax incentives and funding programs
why.why5: Strengthen public policies and strategic innovation agendas

ict.forWhomTitle: Who was the ICT created for

startups.title: 🚀 Startups
startups.startupsF2: Support for deep techs and high complexity projects
startups.startupsF4: Access to companies, capital and market

companies.title: 🏢 Companies
companies.companiesF3: Creation of strategic assets and intellectual property
companies.companiesF4: Projects aligned with ESG and competitiveness

leiBem.title: Innovation that generates tax benefits
leiBem.description: Companies that invest in Research, Development and Innovation (R&D&I) can reduce their tax burden through Lei do Bem (Law nº 11.196/2005). ICT Brasil Startups acts as a structuring, executing and validating environment for Lei do Bem eligible projects.
leiBem.cta: I want to use Lei do Bem with ICT Brasil Startups

benefits.leiBemB1: Deduct up to 34% of R&D&I investments from IRPJ and CSLL
benefits.leiBemB4: Create technological assets and intellectual property
benefits.leiBemB5: Strengthen your innovation and ESG agenda

leiBem.highlight: Innovation stops being just an expense and becomes financial intelligence.

howWeWork.howWeWork3: Connection with startups, universities and researchers
howWeWork.howWeWork5: Support in documentation and technical reports to MCTI

ict.howWeWorkFooter: All within a private ICT, with method, compliance and long-term vision.

cta.title: The call
cta.subtitle: ICT Brasil Startups is an invitation for those who want to build real technology, with method, impact and economic return. If your company already invests — or wants to invest — in innovation, it's time to structure this strategically.
cta.startProject: Start a project with ICT Brasil Startups

closing.text: The future of Brazilian innovation passes through applied science, collaboration and strategy. With ICT Brasil Startups, your company innovates more, reduces risks, accesses tax incentives and generates real impact on the ecosystem.
